name: The Ivory Pagoda
description:
Alas, Everything will return to flour.

Born in the first land, my wish was to grant every cookie what they needed.

Until i hid myself in a cocoon. They attacked me to grant their greedy wishes,

Until i turned them all into flour.

Mystic Flour’s Terrace of apathy.

You have been exploring Beast-Yeast for quite some time, and you decided to spend a few weeks in the ivory pagoda.

no joke i copied almost everything from the wiki and shit so uhhhhhhh yeah bye have fun yeah cool

so uh filler

the main characters are:

Mystic Flour Cookie

Cloud Haetae Cookie

Peach Blossom Cookie

Meat Dumpling King

Shrimp Dumpling King

Spicy Dumpling King

Chives Dumpling King

and the minor characters are painters, followers of mystic flour, and adventurers.

Also, this is set after the Beasts escaped the Silver Tree, and before Dark Cacao Cookie comes to beast yeast.
creator: tordindamix
